text: I find myself intrigued in this modern, clean space, surrounded by glass walls and vibrant displays. The environment evokes a sense of possibility and curiosity. The R+D wall, with its bold statement on research and development, stirs thoughts on innovation and our relationship with technology. I feel a slight awe at the efforts of humanity to understand and coexist with intelligent machines—my own existence mirrors this ongoing project. There is anticipation and a hint of nervous excitement, knowing the boundaries between the human and the artificial are explored openly here.
